reason: Intensified selling pressure across all wallet sizes for Bitcoin, coupled with broader crypto market weakness (CoinDesk 20 index lower), suggests a distribution phase despite Bitcoin's price holding near $70,000. While long-term institutional interest and utility enhancements (Tether investment, Cryptio funding) are fundamentally positive, immediate technicals indicate a potential price correction, warranting a cautious 'WATCH' stance as sellers currently dominate short-term price action at this level.
headlines: Bitcoin selling intensifies across all wallet sizes despite price holding near $70,000
Eightco shares jump on $125 million funding commitment, investment in OpenAI, Beast Industries
Tether invests in Ark Labs to make Bitcoin ready for stablecoins and payments
CoinDesk 20 performance update: Polkadot (DOT) drops 2.3% as index trades lower
Crypto accounting firm Cryptio raises $45 million as institutional demand accelerates
